name: CASH 1 Loans
description_short: CASH 1 Loans offers title loans up to $50,000 and personal loans up to $1,000 with same-day funding and approval in as fast as 15 minutes, welcoming all credit types.
description_long:
CASH 1 Loans is a Nevada-based lending operation with multiple physical locations, including the Las Vegas Nellis Boulevard branch in the Sunrise Manor neighborhood. The company operates as a storefront lender focusing on fast cash access through collateral-based and unsecured personal lending products. With extended hours (8am-9pm weekdays, 11am-5pm Sundays) and a streamlined application process, they position themselves as an accessible alternative to traditional banking for consumers needing immediate funds.

The company offers two primary loan types: Personal Loans ranging from $50 to $1,000 for general cash needs, and Title Loans using vehicle titles as collateral to borrow up to $50,000. Marketing materials emphasize rapid approval (15 minutes), same-day funding, and acceptance of all credit profiles. They provide multiple application channels—online, phone ((888) 858-9333), or in-person—and manage ongoing loan relationships through a mobile app for payments and additional borrowing.

Key distinguishing factors include their "3 Times More Cash" lending structure and explicit "All Credit Welcome" positioning, suggesting they serve borrowers rejected by traditional lenders. The Nellis location specifically highlights convenient parking and proximity to recognizable landmarks (Little Caesar's Pizza, cross streets). Extended operating hours reflect targeting of working consumers unable to visit during standard business hours.

As an emergency-cash lender, CASH 1 fills a legitimate speed and accessibility gap for unbanked/underbanked consumers. However, the website provides no APR, fee, or cost transparency, which is a significant limitation. Title loans carry inherent risk of vehicle repossession, and personal loans at these small amounts typically carry high interest costs. The company's willingness to lend to "all credit" profiles suggests aggressive risk-taking that likely results in costly products for consumers.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day cash availability up to $50,000 via title loans
Fast approval in as little as 15 minutes
Accepts all credit profiles (no credit checks mentioned)
Mobile app for loan management and payment
Physical storefront with ample parking in accessible location
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed on website
Title loans require vehicle collateral, risking repossession
Personal loans capped at $1,000, limiting usefulness for larger emergencies
No mention of income verification process or lending standards
Typical emergency-cash products carry predatory interest rates despite fast access
best_for: Borrowers with vehicle title equity needing $5,000+ quickly without bank access
Unbanked or credit-challenged consumers unable to qualify for personal loans
Workers needing same-day cash for immediate emergencies
Consumers with no alternatives and time-sensitive financial needs
diagnosis: CASH 1 Loans is best for consumers with vehicle equity who need emergency cash within hours and lack access to bank personal loans or credit cards. Primary caveat: the complete absence of APR and fee disclosure on the website makes true cost assessment impossible; emergency-cash products in this category typically carry 100%+ annual rates, making them expensive last-resort options suitable only for genuine emergencies, not routine borrowing.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1995 N Nellis Blvd C, Las Vegas, NV 89115
